programme.title: Suffragette

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes wrong, two hit men are ordered by their crime boss to cool their heels in Bruges. They don't make good tourists and soon find themselves in the oddest of circumstances.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are entering their 30s intent on keeping up their hedonistic lifestyle. That is, until Laura falls in love with Jim and begins to question all of her choices.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: A master auctioneer becomes obsessed with an extremely reclusive heiress and collector of fine art, who he has never actually met.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: A young Irish woman travels to 1950s Brooklyn and falls in love with her new life, until a family tragedy forces her to choose between the two countries and the people in them.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Trapped in a loveless marriage and eager for excitement, a doctor's wife seeks love and fulfilment outside the bonds of matrimony.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of English-born Joan Stanley, who was recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s and went undetected as a British spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
programme.desc: An inspiration film that explores the brilliance of a mathematician that many believed could decipher the very fabric of the universe - possibly existence itself.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: A caving trip goes wrong, trapping a group of women. Stalked by bloodthirsty beasts and turning against each other, they must become as savage as the creatures hunting them.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Examining some of the most dangerous and prolific murderers in the UK and worldwide.

programme.title: Deadly Kin
programme.desc: Nicole's transition leads to a dark money scheme. Uloma and Will's love is tested by illness. Bob's dinner with his rebellious daughter ends in disaster. Dayna's wild romance spirals out of control.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.sub-title: Room For The Night / Down And Out
programme.desc: Detective Rob Barrere investigates when three men meet in a motel room, and one of them ends up dead. Also, Detective Ronnie Leatherman catches the case of a man stabbed 21 times.

programme.title: Killer Cases
programme.desc: Kay Baker, a school teacher and mom, is found lying in her neighbor's yard bleeding to death; soon after discovering her body, police spot a wounded man on the run in the woods.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women may appear to be sugar coated, but outside appearances can be deceiving; they are made of sugar and spite.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: An officer is forced to restrain an armed suspect with a taser. Officers respond to a report of an unhinged woman assaulting people at a skating rink. An elaborate heist backfires on the 'victim'.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A determined quad driver tries to outrun police in the rain. A deputy questions a man's intense distrust of banks. A moped buyer overlooks clear red flags and faces the consequences.

programme.title: Million Dollar Murders
programme.desc: In 1994, Melissa Hunt, 22, was murdered and found in Burrenjim Dam. Despite years of investigation, the case remains unsolved, with a $1 million reward for new leads.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Follow along as detectives in cities across America work tirelessly to generate leads within the first 48 hours of a crime.

programme.title: The Cannibal Next Door
programme.desc: It is the shocking story behind one of the world's most notorious cannibals, told by those closest to the case who reveal how the killer and the victim's lives led to their fatal night together.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Follows the investigation into the murder of Dr Teresa Sievers, which pioneered a forensic technique that solved the case.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: An archaeologist hears about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which could hold the key to humanly existence, but he will have to fight a band of Nazis for the lost treasure.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: A year after his friend's death, Gabe must return to the dreaded mountain peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against criminals, nature and himself.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests John Rambo, he must make a daring escape and prepare himself for a one man war.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An experiment to create a perfect human produced not one, but two twins in mismatched shapes. They set off on a comic adventure to find their mother.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a team of misfits so they'll lose and she can move them to Miami. When they uncover the plot, they decide to teach her a lesson and start winning.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when he is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: Once inseparable pals, two men find themselves on opposite sides of the law, each feeling betrayed by the other. Now, through a strange twist of fate, the pair are on the run - together.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an all-American girls' professional baseball league formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In a future world devastated by disease, a convict is sent back in time to gather information about the man-made virus that wiped out most of the human population.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: An FBI director works with a Russian agent and a jailed terrorist to hunt down the elusive Jackal, a master-of-disguise assassin on a deadly mission.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.desc: When a little boy's nap is disturbed by a bad dream, his mother comes to his rescue. What was terrorizing him? We examine a print that shows how much the Edo townspeople cherished their kids.

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programme.desc: 15,000 years ago, Jomon people lived in settlements while hunting and gathering nature's bounty. These sites show the lifestyle they led for 10,000 years, avoiding conflict and coexisting with nature.

programme.title: The Masterpieces of Tsutaju
programme.desc: This miniseries presents the masterpieces of Tsutaju, a brilliant ukiyo-e producer of the Edo period. This episode takes a close look at artist Utamaro's iconic "Woman with a Glass Noisemaker."

programme.title: Japan Railway Journal
programme.desc: 2025 marks the 110th anniversary of Nagasaki Electric Tramway, which has long been a vital means of transportation for both residents and tourists. Discover the charm of Nagasaki's streetcars.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan

programme.title: MATSURI: The Heartbeat of Japan
programme.desc: Participants of the Hyoge Festival clown around in fun, silly costumes. It originated as a sly way of thanking a local hero, who built reservoirs but was exiled in the 17th century.

programme.title: TOSA: Living with the Shimanto
programme.desc: A centuries-old eel catching technique. Bridges designed to be submerged in the river. Locals have found ingenious ways to coexist with the Shimanto. See this mighty river in time-lapse.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Akasaka Yogetsu, a priest with an international following, is known for combining beatboxing with Buddhist mantras. He talks about Zen philosophy and the spirit of "living in the here and now."

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: In recent years, urban intrusions by bears have significantly increased worldwide. What is behind this phenomenon? How is it related to global warming? We focus our investigation on cases in Japan.

programme.desc: Maxine is a university student. She joined a school providing educational support and life advice to international students wanting to enter Japanese high school. This experience changed her life.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo Mini
programme.desc: In squid-loving Japan, spear squid is immensely popular. Tag along with fishers in Hokkaido and savor some regional cuisine, fresh sushi, and a special take on a beloved Italian-inspired inky dish.

programme.title: Nun's Cookbook
programme.desc: The nuns of Otowasan Kannonji Temple show us how to make sesame-covered taro dumplings. Simply mash up boiled taro, add cheese, sprinkle with sesame, and deep fry for some tasty autumn goodness.

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programme.desc: The brilliant white Himeji Castle is a rare example of a wood castle built without a single nail. With solid battle defenses and beauty preserved by craftsmen, it's a masterpiece of function and form.

programme.title: TOSA: Cape of Faith

programme.desc: Gojinjo Taiko is a wild, powerful performance by masked drummers. It originated 400 years ago, when villagers disguised themselves as oni (demons) to scare away a warlord's army.

programme.title: Feel Good Hits
programme.desc: Upbeat, familiar tracks to brighten your day.

programme.title: Electric Dreams
programme.desc: Low-key classics and fresh hits made for late nights and easy vibes.

programme.title: Totally Timeless
programme.desc: The ultimate mix of guitar-driven anthems and singalong favourites. From soaring choruses to easy rock staples, these are the tracks that never go out of style.

programme.title: Saturday Soundtrack
programme.desc: Turn it up with weekend-ready pop and nothing but good energy.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman (Jackie Chan) must protect a female witness (Brigitte Lin) from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: A failed drug deal lands Frank in debt to a ruthless and dangerous Copenhagen drug lord.

programme.title: Pusher 2: With Blood on My Hands
programme.desc: In part two of Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy, Mads Mikkelsen plays Tonny, a criminal at the mercy of his cold-hearted gangster father.

programme.title: Pusher 3: I'm The Angel of Death
programme.desc: This bloody and captivating film completes Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy. Copenhagen's biggest kingpin must rethink his status when a younger crowd rolls in.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Open Your Eyes
programme.desc: A very handsome gentleman finds the love of his life, but suffers an accident and needs to have his face reconstructed through surgery after being severely disfigured.

programme.title: Dark Diamond
programme.desc: After his father's death, a man vows vengeance against the relatives who abandoned him.

programme.title: Eyes Without a Face
programme.desc: A surgeon causes a car accident which leaves his daughter disfigured and goes to extreme lengths to give her a new face.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Quest for Fire
programme.desc: A prehistoric Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge of how to start a new one, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: A mysterious woman on the run, and the resourceful fixer assigned to bring her in. Their two unique stories inextricably link, as the stakes of the pursuit rise to apocalyptic proportions.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: Chan Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter and a band of unlikely heroes pursue a brutal killer, they find themselves in a deadly no-man's-land known as the Thicket.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: When dangerous criminals on a cargo ship are transported from the Phillipines to South Korea, they unleash a sinister force after an escape attempt leads to a riot. (Subtitles)

programme.title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
programme.desc: Teenagers are tortured, chopped up and impaled on meat hooks by a demented backwards family. This grisly 1974 blood-curdler ranks with Psycho and Halloween as a landmark in the horror/slasher genre.

programme.title: Final Cut
programme.desc: Life imitates art when the cast and crew of a low-budget zombie flick start to turn into the living dead.

programme.title: Dollman vs. Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: Howling VI: The Freaks
programme.desc: A villainous carnival owner traps a young werewolf to include in his growing menagerie of inhuman exhibits.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: Norval, a privileged man-child travels to the beautiful and remote cabin of his estranged father, in order to reconnect with him as he hasn't seen him in 30 years.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Veronica meets a James Dean-type newcomer who suggests they kill off the popular kids and end the cruel, unfair treatment the girls impose on unpopular kids at school.

programme.title: The Navigator: A Medieval Odyssey
programme.desc: A young 14th Century boy with acute psychic powers believes that he can rescue his fellow villagers by tunnelling their way through the earth. To their surprise they come out in New Zealand in 1988.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: A hit man is sent to Spain to kidnap an ex-criminal and transport him to Paris for execution.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: As he investigates the missing person report of a teenager, detective Kozenczak becomes concerned that local businessman John Wayne Gacy may be responsible. However, their evidence is circumstantial.

programme.title: Police Story 3: Super Cop
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug czar.

programme.title: Top Knot Detective
programme.desc: Takashi Takamoto begins writing jingles for a well-known Japanese company and ends up creating a bloody series of samurai action that, over time, becomes a cult series.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: Relaxer
programme.desc: With the impending Y2K apocalypse fast approaching, Abbie is faced with the ultimate challenge - the unbeatable level 256 on Pac-Man - and he can't get off the couch until he conquers it.

programme.title: Amulet
programme.desc: An ex-soldier is offered a place to stay at a decaying house inhabited by a young woman and her dying mother. Falling for her, he suspects something sinister is going on.

programme.title: Lords of Chaos
programme.desc: The origins of Norwegian Black Metal and a group of young men with a flair for publicity, church-burning and murder.

programme.title: Wrong Place
programme.desc: A meth cook hunts down the former police chief in order to silence him before he can deliver eyewitness testimony against his family.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A young London writer follows strangers for inspiration, but his hobby becomes an obsession, leading him further into their lives than he ever intended.

programme.title: Synchronic
programme.desc: Two New Orleans paramedics' lives are ripped apart after they encounter a series of horrific deaths linked to a designer drug with bizarre, other-worldly effects.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: The radiation from a fallen satellite causes the recently deceased to rise from the grave and seek the living to use as food.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, months after the first film, Ming suspects a superintendent is a triad mole, while years earlier, Yan undertakes his first mission. (Subtitles).

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A cop investigates the disappearance of several call girls he pimps out.

programme.title: Possession
programme.desc: A woman starts exhibiting increasingly disturbing behavior after asking her husband for a divorce. Suspicions of infidelity soon give way to something much more sinister.

programme.title: Upstream Color
programme.desc: A woman is abducted and hypnotised with an organic material harvested from a specific flower. When she falls for a man, the two realise he may also have been subjected to the same process.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: The death of a ex-lover puts a French cop on a collision course with the Yakuza and the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: Terrifier
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Tara Heyes finds herself as the obsession of a sadistic murderer known as Art the Clown.

programme.title: Terrifier 2
programme.desc: Resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County to terrorise a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween night.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: Sator
programme.desc: Secluded in a desolate forest, a broken family is observed by the demon Sator who is attempting to claim them.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: When pregnant Ellie returns to her childhood home to complete a book, she's reunited with her mother. Consumed by dark memories of the house, she ends up unearthing a horrifying reality.

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: The flesh-eating undead have wiped out every last vestige of the civilised world. Deep underground, a group of scientists and soldiers work to find a cure for the unstoppable plague.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

programme.title: Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Emma must uncover the dark secret behind a cursed radio to survive and protect her family.

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: A girl enrols in an upmarket ballet academy, only to realise that the school is a front for something much more sinister and supernatural.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Billy Warlock) discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Re-Animator
programme.desc: A medical student (Jeffrey Combs) brings his headless professor back from the dead with a special serum.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Puppet Master II
programme.desc: The malicious marionettes are back to resurrect their dead master and evict parapsychologists from the family estate.

programme.title: Puppet Master III: Toulon's Revenge
programme.desc: Gestapo agents face killer dolls when they murder puppeteer Toulon's wife in this prequel to "Puppet Master".

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: District B13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Two gunrunners and a pregnant policewoman (Tracy Scoggins) are trapped in a warehouse with a bad boy's toys.

programme.title: Demonic Toys: Personal Demons
programme.desc: A group of people on a world wide search for oddities find themselves trapped in a nine hundred year old Italian castle when they accidently unleash the Demonic Toys.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: A group of girls are kidnapped and trained to become assassins for a criminal organisation, ruled over by the ruthless Madam M.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: A bedridden stuntman entrances a little girl with tales of exotic heroes. As his health reaches the point of peril so does the story he's telling, with dramatic consequences. An epic fantasy.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Tonight's episode kicks off with a chase for a suspicious Fiesta. The driver crashes into a roundabout, and the occupants flee on foot.

programme.title: All New Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Dealing with runaway drivers is an everyday challenge for the Traffic Cops.

programme.title: Code 1: Extreme
programme.desc: A Tuakau family face their worst nightmare as a loved one fights for breath. Paramedics battle dense bush to reach a critical hiker.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A southerly swell from the Tasman Sea brings six to eight foot waves. In one of the season's biggest swirls, two scuba divers attempt a dangerous jump from the rocks.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Fergus worries about his new son's quality of life when the baby is bullied by superstitious Protestants. Claire performs surgery on Tom's hand.

programme.desc: While visiting the Cherokee, Ian encounters a man from his past who dredges up painful memories of his time with the Mohawk. Jamie meets an agent who challenges his convictions.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie experience the rising tensions in the colonies when they attend a Loyalist event in Wilmington in honour of the Scottish heroine Flora MacDonald.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A dysentery epidemic spreads on the Ridge, and Claire falls deathly ill. She is almost recovered when the Christies arrive and drop a bombshell.

programme.desc: Claire struggles with her demons as a nefarious rumour begins to spread on the Ridge. Tensions rise as the residents fear there is a dangerous person in their midst.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Richard Brown and his Committee of Safety arrive to arrest Claire for murder. However, due to the rising tensions in the colonies, Brown's plan to find a judge for a trial does not go as expected.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While on her second honeymoon, World War II nurse Claire Randall is mysteriously transported back in time to 1743 Scotland where she is kidnapped by a group of Highlanders and meets a young man named Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is taken to Castle Leoch, where she meets the Laird. As suspicions about her identity run high, Claire tries to blend in, and befriends the mysterious Geillis Duncan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.

programme.desc: Jamie finds himself between a rock and a hard place when a redcoat deserter from his past resurfaces.

programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jaime from his redcoat captors. However, when Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jaime.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jaime awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan.

programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Tensions run high in the village of Solomon Gorge, when a fishing competition and extreme obstacle course are scheduled for the same weekend. It's not long before both groups start sabotaging each event.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: In Pie Week, our remaining amateur bakers compete to make their signature Party Pies, a Galette des Rois, and a fruity Tangram Pie.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: In Bread Week, our remaining amateur bakers create Mini Bagels, Turkish bread with Za'atar and showstopping Reveal Bread.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: Tropical week gets fruity as our remaining amateur bakers make Tropical Tarts, a Mille Feuille and Meringue Bombes.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: In Little and Large week, our remaining amateur bakers serve up Tiny Tiered cakes, a Giant Chocolate Eclair and the bakers create a whole Biscuit City.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Japan week, and our remaining amateur bakers tackle Shokupan Buns, a Matcha & Black Sesame Crepe Roll and show off their Double Fromage Cheesecakes.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Earth week! Our remaining amateur bakers go sustainable and celebrate the Earth with Raw Cakes, Beetroot Tarts and Edible Terrariums.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Patisserie Week as our remaining bakers compete for a spot in the finale, creating an En Croute, a Spiced Charlotte Russe and Modern Viennoiserie.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: In the grand finale, bakers vie for the title with a Top Forward Cake, a Raspberry and Chocolate Entremets, and a spectacular Choux-Stopper creation.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Thirty-two bakers take on a baking battle to wow judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood with their own amazing cakes. It's the first of the heats in which four hopefuls face two tough baking challenges.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: In the second of the heats, four more bakers are challenged to bake tricky jammy shortbread biscuits, before tackling the Invention Challenge with their own recipes for a chocolate celebration cake.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The four contestants embark on a series of challenges to test their baking ability. After baking 12 carrot cake muffins, they face the task of creating a cake to celebrate their favourite festival.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Under the eyes of Aaron Craze and judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood, four bakers compete in the ultimate baking contest. First they must show off their technical skills as they bake a batch of choc chip cookies.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: In this royal-themed episode, Jim, Scott, Sangita and Galway go head-to-head in a baking battle: contending with cheese scones and cakes for royalty. Which cake impresses the judges most?

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Kai, Sami, Abigail and Olivia are up against the clock in the Technical Challenge as they attempt to bake the ultimate lemon drizzle cake in an hour. Then, the competition gets even harder in the Invention Challenge.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Jacob, Conal, Katie and Coco-Nina are baking to impress the judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry. The junior bakers' cake mixing skills are tested as they attempt to bake a Swiss roll in the Technical Challenge.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the final heat, and the four contestants battle to win a place in the semifinal. The theme is Halloween and the competitors are challenged to impress the judges with their spooky biscuits.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: In the first semifinal, the competition gets much tougher as Saffron, Joe, Kieran and Cameron show off their bread and pastry skills. The pressure is on the judges to make the tough decision on who makes it through.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Four hopeful semifinalists enter the next level of the competition as they compete for a place in the final. They need to prove their dough and pastry making skills as they prepare mini-pizzas.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: On the first day of the finals, semifinal winners Saffron, Kai, Freya and Kieran undertake a baking master class from award-winning pastry chef Cherish Finden, at the world-renowned five-star Langham London Hotel.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: In the second round of the finals, Saffron, Kai, Freya and Kieran are tested on their baking facts in a knowledge quiz and practical challenge. Then, they are tasked with baking for a glamorous party.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the grand final of the greatest baking battle on Earth, and Saffron, Kai, Freya and Kieran face their biggest challenge yet. The four finalists must prepare two of their favourite recipes.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Four young bakers face The Technical Challenge, following James Martin's tricky recipe for biscotti and lemonade, before taking on the Showstopper where they must pull out all the stops baking a racing-themed cake.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Four budding bakers enter the tent and face two demanding challenges. They must master James' recipe for melt-in-the-middle chocolate fondant before they let their imaginations run wild with a Showstopper cake.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: With Aaron Craze by their side, a new batch of bakers enter the tent hoping for baking glory. With a place in the semifinals at stake, the bakers face two tough challenges.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Mary puts them to the test with a Technical Challenge for perfect melting moment biscuits, before they have to get in the party mood with a cake fit for a carnival.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The four bakers attempt two challenges that will test their abilities to the max. After tackling technically difficult rock cakes, they must solve a real puzzle of a challenge by creating show-stopping jigsaw biscuits.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: A new batch of junior bakers face two tough tests. First they attempt Mary's recipe for Welsh cakes, then they must try and enchant the judges with a cake inspired by a fairy tale of their choice.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Four bakers face technically tricky pastry as they attempt James' recipe for scrumptious cheese straws, followed by a creation of their own design - a cake in the shape of a monster.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: With a place in the semifinal at stake, the bakers face the technical challenge, putting their baking intuition on the spot as they are faced with a new recipe.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Facing James' recipe for technically tricky butterfly cakes, they are then challenged to bake a showstopping cake that resembles a natural wonder of the world.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: In the final heat, four young bakers face another serving of challenges as they compete for the last place in the semifinals. In the technical challenge they take on notoriously tricky crumpets with mixed results.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Five young bakers return to the tent for the semifinals to prove their worth as they face the most demanding challenges yet.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: In the second semifinal, five young bakers battle for the last two places in the final, and Mary and James have turned up the heat.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: For their first challenge the finalists leave the security of the Bake Off tent and head to a professional kitchen where they will be tasked to make world-class scones and shortbread tea-fancies.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the second stage of the final and the four finalists are put under more pressure in James and Mary's knowledge test. Will their piping skills be up to scratch?

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: After 900 eggs, 50kg of flour, and bucket loads of edible glitter, the Grand Final has arrived. The four finalists face the ultimate challenge in a last bid to impress judges Mary Berry and James Martin.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The show is back with 40 of the best young bakers. Alyth, Harrison, Kiah and Matthew have their baking knowledge tested when they're asked to follow a recipe for strawberry shortcake stacks.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Farhaan, Hannah, Olivia and Tom are asked to follow a surprise classic French recipe for madeleines. Then things get messy as the bakers get stuck into their show-stopping ultimate chocolate gateaux.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Allegra McEvedy and Graham Hornigold set four more wannabe bakers two more challenges. Their baking know-how is tested with a surprise recipe for a chequerboard biscuit that requires mathematical precision.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Euan, Lucy, Peter and Sienna face bread for the first time in these heats. Judges Graham and Allegra want them to make Indian rotis. In the showstopper challenge, the bakers must produce pull-apart cupcakes.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Graham and Allegra set the latest batch of bakers the Technical Challenge of a salted caramel cake. In their Showstopper, the bakers are challenged to create biscuits that represent their love of music.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Alice, Corey, Finlay and Sufia are tested on their ability to make stained glass window biscuits. For the Showstopper Challenge, the bakers have to bake their dream birthday cake full of personality and creativity.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Alfie, Andrea, Freddie and Lucy must bake technically-challenging cheese soda bread. Then, it's all about cake pops for the showstopper, where the bakers need to prove they've got what it takes.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Ben, Darcey, Isabel and Will, enter the famous tent to attempt a pineapple and blueberry upside-down cake in the technical challenge. The showstopper sees the wannabe bakers depict their lives in biscuit form.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The technical challenge gets hosts Sam and Mark very excited as it's their favourite pudding: a good old-fashioned Jam Roly-Poly. The bakers must create a show-stopping Inside Out Cake.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: On the hottest day in the tent so far, the bakers must produce a 3D biscuit construction depicting an iconic landmark. The bakers race against the clock and the temperature to keep their biscuit creations vertical.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The judges have turned the challenges up a notch starting with Graham's recipe for a Paris-Brest choux pastry ring. Then the bakers have to come up with their show-stopping version of a decorative fruit pie.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Each of the five young hopefuls must produce one of Allegra's recipes for a meringue en bouche. Then, their pastry-making skills are tested with showstopping mini tarts, which must have a scary theme.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The judges examine the bakers' knowledge with a series of tough Technical Tests. Then they get to show off their sculpting skills by creating bread buns in the shape of animals. Who will bake their way to success?

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the final, and the last four bakers enter the Bake-Off tent to face their first Signature Challenge. While the challenge itself isn't a surprise, the celebrity guests who they are baking for are.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The four finalists have to bake like they've never baked before as they face the final challenge - creating a tiered, layered, show-stopping enchanted woodland-themed cake, in just two and a half hours.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Allegra McEvedy and Bake Off winner, Nadiya Hussain, have the tough job of finding Britain's best young baker in the most intense baking competition yet. Expect spectacular bakes and others which topple and fall.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The contestants' baking knowledge and skills are put to the test when they are asked to follow Nadiya's surprise recipe for shortbread peanut butter squares.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The four bakers entering the third heat of Junior Bake Off have the mammoth task of flipping 12 uniform pancakes to produce a glossy chocolate-covered pancake cake.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers take inspiration from their travels for Showstopper International Cakes which transport the judges from Denmark, to Iran and via The Caribbean to Australia.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The judges set the bakers a 100 percent British Technical Challenge - but with a twist. It's Allegra's surprise recipe for squashed fly scones, accompanied by home-made jam and cream.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers tackle a food illusion showstopper to create sweet bakes that look like a savoury meal. Who will perform the magic to conjure a place in the quarterfinals?

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are tasked with making an identical batch of prune and carrot cupcakes topped with beautifully uniform piped frosting.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The Technical Challenge is one of Allegra's recipes for pizzetta Bianchi. Then, the bakers have to invent a dessert in show-stopping cake form.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: This episode's technical recipe is for a British classic: Battenburg but with a bit of a twist. Then, the bakers produce a showstopping selfie on a giant cookie.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the last day of the heats and just one place remains in the quarterfinals. For the Showstopper Challenge, the bakers must showcase their artistic side, creating detailed artwork on a painted cake.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the start of Finals Week, where 40 bakers have been reduced to just 10, and this episode the first five quarterfinalists enter the Bake Off tent, all targeting a place in the semifinals.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the second quarterfinal, and the Technical Bake sees the bakers tied up in doughy knots as they try to follow Allegra's recipe for baked pretzels and dip.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The semifinalists face a gruelling technical knowledge test - including creating a perfectly-plaited loaf plus a blindfolded taste challenge.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers must produce two different canapes made with rough puff pastry for their first-ever Signature Challenge, and while the bakes themselves aren't a surprise, the guests they'll be making them for are.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: From the 40 bakers who entered the tent, there are now only three, and one of them will be crowned champion. Everything rests on what the finalists bake this episode.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The first heat of 10 junior bakers enter the Bake Off tent for two exciting baking challenges. Bakers are asked to follow Prue's surprise recipe for a tea party classic.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's biscuit day and the heat A bakers return to the Bake Off tent for two exciting baking challenges.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers get stuck into a messy technical challenge working with sticky swirls of dough designed to test their baking prowess.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's dessert day on Junior Bake Off and Prue and Liam are looking for the bakers to produce the perfect finale to any meal.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: To earn their place, the bakers need to impress judges Prue and Liam with their pastry plaiting skills while making a fiddly, vegetarian classic pastry.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Bakers need to demonstrate they have a light touch and steady hand as they are faced with Prue's recipe for a children's party favourite given a sophisticated update.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's their moment to shine as the bakers are asked to create a "biscuit picture of your best day ever", a chance to show off their skills and tell the judges something about themselves.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: In the technical, they need to brush up on their chef skills alongside their baking knowledge as they prepare a delicious breakfast using one of Liam's favourite recipes.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's dessert day and the bakers must produce delicious, sweet creations for judges Prue and Liam.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Liam's technical challenge is an unusual hybrid requiring the bakers to demonstrate knowledge and techniques worthy of an advanced pastry chef.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the first day of finals week with the final 10 junior bakers, and to celebrate, it's chocolate day.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Day two of finals week and the bakers that remain must go global, having their skills tested in tricky international challenges.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: For the remaining junior bakers in finals week, their building skills will be tested on Construction Day. Which bakers will impress Liam and Prue enough to keep their places in the tent, and who will head home?

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the Junior Bake Off semifinal and the perfect time to test the remaining bakers' skills in some of the more challenging areas of patisserie.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the final of Junior Bake Off and for the last remaining bakers, the stakes couldn't be higher as they have to prepare multiple bakers for a tea party, testing every aspect of the bakers' skills.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The first heat of eight junior bakers enter the Bake Off tent for two exciting baking challenges.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: New judge Ravneet makes her mark by asking the bakers to attempt the near impossible in biscuit form, in a technical challenge.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers get twisted in the technical challenge, mastering tricky shaping techniques to create an intricate design.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The risk of collapse has never been greater in the technical challenge as the bakers are asked to make a dessert with ultimate height and jiggle, shaped in the form of an animal.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: In the technical challenge, Liam asks the bakers to re-create an object you'd never expect to see in pastry form.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: In their first-ever technical challenge, the new group take on a tricky cake construction challenge that creates a wow-worthy pattern when cut into.

programme.desc: First up, Liam leaves the bakers wide-eyed in disbelief as he sets the muckiest technical challenge ever seen in the tent.

programme.desc: In the first challenge, the bakers get their hands dirty when things get twisted in the technical challenge.

programme.desc: Things stack up in a chocolatey technical challenge with layer upon layer of gooey deliciousness.

programme.desc: Ravneet's technical challenge takes us to Spain where a classic snack is given a program twist.

programme.desc: The pressure is on the bakers in the technical challenge to pipe and bake an intricate design into their Japanese-inspired bakes.

programme.desc: For the technical challenge, the bakers need steady hands as they stack their bakes into a seemingly impossible tower to present to the judges.

programme.desc: It's Dessert Day and the bakers must produce delicious, sweet creations for judges Ravneet Gill and Liam Charles.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Pastry Day for the Heat B bakers and their last chance to win a place in Finals Week.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the first day of finals week and our final eight junior bakers celebrate by diving into chocolate day.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's day two of Finals Week and flavour is key as the remaining bakers compete for the title of Star Baker on the first-ever Super Snack Day.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Things get soapy in the Technical Challenge when sponge takes on a double meaning and the bakers prepare to do the washing up. The bakers culinary sorcery skills are tested further in the Showstopper.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the Junior Bake Off semifinal and judges Rav and Liam have themed all the challenges around fruit.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the Final, and the pressure is on! The bakers tackle their only Signature Challenge of the series, creating ice-cream sandwiches and dessert jars to share with their loved ones.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The first heat of eight junior bakers enter the Bake Off tent for two exciting baking challenges. Sponge baking and jam making are put to the test in a tricky first Technical Challenge.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The first heat of bakers return to the tent for two biscuit challenges. Rav brings a touch of magic to the tent for the Technical, and the bakers must create a 'perfect Saturday' biscuit diorama.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's bread day and the bakers have a lot to prove in two tough challenges. First, they must avoid big catastrophes in the Technical, before testing their shaping skills in the Showstopper.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's dessert day and the bakers must battle to stay afloat in a tricky amphibious Technical, while the sky's the limit in the Showstopper, with an out-of-this-world, dessert-laden milkshake.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's pastry day and the last chance for the first heat of bakers to make it to finals week. For the Showstopper the bakers must overcome their worst fears and bake their phobias into a tart.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's back to day one as the second batch of bakers enter the tent. In the Technical they take on a cake pop with an expression they won't want to see on the judges' faces.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's biscuit day. Rav challenges the bakers to predict the future with cookies, and they construct their own eighth wonders of the world. Who will be crowned star baker, and who will leave?

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers must rise to two tricky challenges on bread day. Liam sets a cute barbecue classic for the Technical, and in the Showstopper the bakers immortalise their best friends in bread.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's dessert day and Liam sets the bakers the muckiest technical ever seen in the tent. Later, the bakers must leave the school gates behind and create their dream school trip out of blondies.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's pastry day and the last chance to win a coveted place in finals week. Rav ramps up the pressure in the technical by asking the bakers to make her favourite guilty pleasure.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers celebrate the most important meal of the day: breakfast. First they must create an airy snack, before stacking layers of delicious pancakes sky-high in the showstopper.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's day two of finals week and the remaining bakers are on a mission to impress. They must fuse two delicious street food items in the technical before creating supersize snacks.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining six bakers face a food hack challenge. They unite two cult food items in a technical task, before taking on the challenge of creating massive cookie layer cakes for the showstopper.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the semi-final and time for patisserie. The technical may look cute, but a bad temper could ruin everything. In the showstopper, the bakers attempt the pinnacle of sophistication: entremets.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the final and the stakes couldn't be higher as the bakers prepare for a red carpet event. In the only signature of the series, they must prepare 24 mini desserts before making a cake.
